info.title: Aruba ClearPass Policy Manager REST API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the Aruba ClearPass Policy Manager (CPPM) REST API. Generated from the official pyclearpass Python SDK (v6.12) by HPE Aruba Networking. Authenticate via POST /api/oauth to obtain a Bearer token. See https://github.com/aruba/pyclearpass for the source SDK.

tags.name: Certificate Authority
tags.description: Manage the built-in CA, certificates, and Onboard users/devices

tags.name: Endpoint Visibility
tags.description: OnGuard, device profiling, fingerprints, network scan, and subnet mappings

tags.name: Enforcement Profiles
tags.description: Manage enforcement profiles and Downloadable User Role (DUR) sub-resources

tags.name: Global Server Configuration
tags.description: Admin users, operator profiles, attributes, licenses, cluster parameters

tags.name: Guest Actions
tags.description: Generate passes, receipts, and send guest notifications

tags.name: Guest Configuration
tags.description: Web login pages, print/pass templates, and guest manager settings

tags.name: Identities
tags.description: Guests, local users, endpoints, devices, API clients, static host lists

tags.name: Insight
tags.description: Insight analytics alerts and report configurations

tags.name: Integrations
tags.description: Context server actions, endpoint context servers, syslog, extensions

tags.name: Local Server Configuration
tags.description: Per-server settings - AD domains, services, SNMP, cluster nodes

tags.name: Logs
tags.description: System events, login audit, and Insight endpoint lookup

tags.name: Platform Certificates
tags.description: Server certs, trust lists, client certs, and revocation lists

tags.name: Policy Elements
tags.description: Services, roles, role mappings, enforcement policies, NADs, auth sources

tags.name: Session Control
tags.description: Query, disconnect, and reauthorize active RADIUS sessions via CoA

tags.name: Tools & Utilities
tags.description: Random passwords, MPSK generation, email and SMS sending
